description: Machine-readable roll-up of intentional Scind<->Xcind divergences. Mirrors each NNNN-{slug}.md frontmatter. P6's cross-project-sync procedure diffs observed deltas against this baseline; a delta matching an Active entry is expected, a delta with no entry is triaged.

categories.Structural: Language/build/packaging - permanent. Admitted on one-line justification.
categories.Design: A design choice Xcind made against canon on purpose. Adversarial re-check required; re-audit each round.
categories.Scope: Xcind deliberately doesn't do something Scind specifies. Adversarial re-check required; re-audit each round.
categories.Process: Docs/workflow/tooling difference. Admitted on one-line justification.

entries.title: Bash vs Go tech stack
entries.notes: Permanent language substrate (global-context §5).

entries.title: Two-track documentation
entries.scind_canon: single docs/ LDS tree (no populated user track)
entries.notes: Structural rename half PROMOTED as XA-0043; residual = populated user track.

entries.title: Sourceable-shell config model
entries.notes: global-context §2a Example A. Parent of 0004,0005.

entries.title: Env-specific file-pattern expansion
entries.notes: Rides on 0003; flavor review = ESCALATE L-0039.

entries.title: Config shell-injection/escaping surface
entries.notes: Child of 0003; a liability not a capability.

entries.title: Own-app-only service-discovery scope (v1)
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P3+P7). v1 gap; resolves if Xcind ships v2.

entries.title: Single-file config model (workspace+app)
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P3+P7). Inversion question = ESCALATE L-0037.

entries.title: --check runtime dependency checker
entries.notes: Static Go binary embeds these; meaningless in Scind.

entries.title: .xcind.sh trust/security warning
entries.notes: Consequence of 0003/0005; parsed YAML runs no code.

entries.title: --generate-starship --format nix output
entries.scind_canon: none — prompt concept promoted as XA-0010
entries.notes: Prompt concept = PROMOTE XA-0010; Nix format is packaging detail.

entries.title: --preview resolved-command flag
entries.notes: Capability already in Scind; arrangement detail. See SA-0026.

entries.title: Shell expansion in file patterns
entries.notes: Mechanism twin of 0004; rides on 0003; L-0039.

entries.title: Per-file .override sibling auto-derivation
entries.notes: Scind already has equivalent; layout choice. Preservation = L-0015.

entries.title: XCIND_ADDITIONAL_CONFIG_FILES includes
entries.notes: Child of 0003; typed layering already composes config.

entries.title: Default proxy domain localhost.scind.io
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Multi-label rule PROMOTED as XA-0002.

entries.title: Assigned-port sticky-trust allocation
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Promotable half = SA-0005 (CANON-OVERREACH → P6); keep routed.

entries.title: Stateless identity/registry (TSV)
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). CANON-CONFIRM L-0022; manifest question L-0035.

entries.title: Concern-split per-hook overlays
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Byte-identical output; live-vs-pure = XA-0001/L-0005.

entries.title: Internal 4-phase hook vocabulary
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). CONTINGENT on ESCALATE XA-0019 — RE-OPEN if it promotes.

entries.title: Per-app SHA-keyed config.json
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). --json contract = L-0012; manifest = L-0035.

entries.title: Options-based targeting by name
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Scind registry = superset. Xcind should file an ADR.

entries.title: *_HOST_GATEWAY env-var injection
entries.notes: Scind KEEPS mandating (NOT overreach). Optional Xcind backlog to add env var. RG-0001.

entries.title: Computed generated manifest
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). At-rest readability legit. Soft P6 note: 3 surfaces / L-0035.

entries.title: Flavors (variant configs)
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). = compose profiles. L-0039. Soft P6: note deferral in ADR-0005.

entries.title: port_inventory status model
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Soft P6 note: 'unavailable' sub-state inherits SA-0005 taint.

entries.title: Workspace state machine
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Scind spec also says state inferred; descriptive model. Facets 0033/0034.

entries.title: port scan / port gc
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Soft P6 note: scan's role in SA-0005 error flow. Tied to 0025.

entries.title: Workspace-wide up/down/restart
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Overreach INVERTED: Xcind under-built. Highest-value reconsider; likely resolves.

entries.title: workspace clone from repo URLs
entries.xcind_reality: no repository concept; dirs user brings
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Multi-repo bootstrap is real; Xcind scope choice.

entries.title: Port-type plugins + tcp/SNI routing
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). (Future) in both; permanent subset.

entries.title: Shared volumes
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). (Future) in both; permanent subset.

entries.title: Visibility (public/protected) labels
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Named consumer (Servlo). Soft P6: 'access-control' is a misnomer. RG-0002/L-0034.

entries.title: Explicit workspace generate
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Inspection affordance; facet of 0026.

entries.title: Explicit workspace destroy
entries.notes: Adversarial re-check performed (P7). Maps to stateful cleanup; facet of 0026.

entries.title: Reference-appendices presentation
entries.xcind_reality: no eng appendices; folded inline + user docs/ (Diataxis)
entries.notes: Leave Scind appendices as-is. Ties to 0002. Error-catalog piece = SA-0021 backlog.

rejected.reason: Adversarial re-check + human product-call resolved to canon-change (L-0018 apex scoped to proxied exports; L-0028 hybrid primary:true-else-positional). Not a divergence.
Resolved to CANON-CHANGE (L-0008 redirect middleware, L-0011 preferred-scheme .url) plus ESCALATE L-0034 (visibility → recorded as divergence 0032). Not a divergence itself.

P7 adversarial re-check FAILED admission: user-overridable %VAR% template surface is speculative generality in tension with Scind ADR-0004 (convention-based naming); Xcind's hard-coded naming proves fixed conventions suffice. Route to P6: keep default templates, drop the override surface.
DELIBERATELY-DEFERRED but retained on Xcind's roadmap (both projects still plan it). Cannot pass canon-neutrality (Xcind intends to build it). Not a permanent divergence.
DELIBERATELY-DEFERRED but retained on Xcind's roadmap. Same as SA-0016 — shared future work, not a divergence.
Already labeled CANON-OVERREACH in P5 (fail-fast mis-fires on idempotent re-up). Related divergence 0016 was narrowed so it does not absorb this learning.
